prompt: tmux feels really basic. I want to feel like my tmux is a cockpit — session restoration, easier pane resizing, maybe a status bar with git info.

assertions.check: session.json.suggestions has at least 3 entries with id/type/title/rationale
types include all of: existing, addon, new
at least one suggestion acknowledges tools/tmux/ already exists and builds on it (addon or existing type rather than proposing a new tools/tmux)
at least one suggestion names a concrete session-restoration solution (tmux-resurrect, tmux-continuum, or equivalent)
suggestions or notes address how plugins are loaded (tpm or equivalent) since tmux needs a plugin manager
